name: Suspicious Package Manager Activity
description: Detects package manager processes spawning unexpected child processes indicative of supply chain compromise
query:
// Detect package managers spawning shells or network tools
// Indicates possible malicious post-install scripts
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)(npm|pip|gem|nuget|cargo|composer|yarn)"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|bash|sh|curl|wget|nc|ncat)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
